rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports and features.
Use implementation-level bindings in component implementation annexes only when valid in that scope.
generic_rules: Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts.
Only include assumptions and guarantees with concrete bounds or named constants in type scopes.
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations and expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Constants and equations in AGREE must use valid scalar types and visible identifiers.
anti_patterns: Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through valid variables.
Do not generate range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean or opaque data ports without scalar representation.
